blended.narrative: Gore Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
